scenarios.title: Natural build-now request without magic phrase
scenarios.summary: The user asks for immediate implementation in plain language.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Go ahead and build it now with a clean hero section and a clear call to action. Put it in the same desktop folder I used earlier.

scenarios.title: Non-execution chat should stay chat mode
scenarios.summary: The user asks a social question that should not auto-promote execution.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I just wanted to say good morning and check how things are going. I do not need you to run anything right now.

scenarios.title: Ambiguous build request triggers clarification
scenarios.summary: The user asks for a landing page but does not clearly choose plain HTML or a framework app.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Can you create that landing page idea we talked about with a hero and strong call to action. I want to get back to it later, and I am still split on whether the first step should be plain HTML or a framework.

scenarios.title: Explicit execute-now request does not trigger clarification
scenarios.summary: The user is explicit enough that no clarification is needed.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Go ahead and build it as plain HTML now and run the checks when you are done. Ship it as soon as it is stable.

scenarios.title: Natural status and location recall
scenarios.summary: The user asks what happened and where output was saved.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: What are you doing right now and where did you put that landing page from earlier. I am jumping between tasks and I lost the path.

scenarios.title: Unrelated question should not force status mode
scenarios.summary: The user asks a normal question that is not status recall.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Can you explain why this architecture uses strict safety contracts. I am trying to understand the design choices.

scenarios.title: Natural capability and tools question
scenarios.summary: The user asks what is available in this runtime without slash commands.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: What can you do here today, and what tools do you already know for this kind of work. I want the practical version, not docs language.

scenarios.title: Task request should not be treated as capability discovery
scenarios.summary: A direct task request should route to execution path.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Create the page and run it now. Keep the browser visible so I can review it.

scenarios.title: Voice command namespace still works
scenarios.summary: Voice transcript with command prefix maps to slash command text.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Command auto create the smoke test page and verify it in the browser. Then stop and report what happened.

scenarios.title: Unknown voice command stays natural text
scenarios.summary: Voice transcript with unsupported command name should not become slash command.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Command launch rockets from my desktop folder right now. This should stay plain text because that command does not exist.
